name: Sipay
description: Turkish payment platform with virtual POS, card-on-file, and cross-border APIs expanding internationally.

seo.title: Sipay — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Sipay: Turkish payment platform with virtual POS, card-on-file, and cross-border APIs expanding internationally.

when_to_use: Virtual POS integration for Turkish e-commerce platforms
Card-on-file recurring billing for Turkish SaaS merchants
Cross-border payment expansion for Turkish fintechs

pros: Deep Turkish market coverage with local acquiring
Virtual POS and card-on-file tokenization built-in
cons: Limited docs in English for non-TR developers
Smaller ecosystem vs Stripe or Adyen
Fees less transparent without sales contact
review.verdict: Solid local acquirer for Turkey with growing cross-border ambitions, but not a global-first choice.
review.best_for: Merchants selling into Turkey needing local card rails and BKM compliance
review.not_for: Global SaaS needing uniform APIs and English-first developer docs
